/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libexample_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libexample_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/example_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/example_ros2_interface/msg/robot_pose__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/example_ros2_interface/msg/robot_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/example_ros2_interface/srv/move_robot__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
